entity.summary: Non-custodial peer-to-peer cryptocurrency marketplace launched in 2017 as LocalEthereum and rebranded to LocalCryptos in 2019 when it added Bitcoin support. LocalCryptos announced a voluntary wind-down in October 2022 and disabled new trade creation after 2022-11-18, while keeping its non-custodial wallet interface available.
entity.notes: HEI models LocalCryptos as a dead P2P / DEX-like marketplace because new trade creation was disabled after 2022-11-18. The original domain remains reachable under the LocalCryptos identity, so official_url_status is live_verified even though new trade creation is disabled.

evidence.title: LocalCryptos wind-down schedule
evidence.notes: Contemporary coverage preserves the first-party phased closure schedule, including the November 18, 2022 end of new trade creation.
